Flux.1.summary: High-quality text-to-image generation model by Black Forest Labs, optimized for fast inference and outpainting.

Flux.1 Kontext.summary: Frontier image editing model with advanced reasoning and style transfer, preserving character consistency through natural language instructions.

Flux.2.summary: FLUX.2 [dev] from Black Forest Labs. Enhanced realism and crisper text generation.

Flux.2 Dev.summary: Flux.2 Dev is optimized for product mockups and design-oriented text-to-image and image editing tasks, offering efficient FP8 inference.

Flux.2 Klein.summary: A lightweight 4 billion parameter version of Flux 2, optimized for speed while maintaining quality. Supports up to 2K resolution.

Flux.summary: Fast model optimized for LoRA training, highly customizable, though colors and textures may be less realistic.

Wan2.2.summary: Fast text-to-video model from Alibaba producing cinematic outputs with crisp textures and realistic colors, though with limited diversity and structure.

Wan2.1.summary: Efficient video generation model supporting video LoRAs, used for video-to-video and inpainting workflows.

Wan2.1 VACE.summary: Wan variant optimized for video editing, restyling, and inpainting with support for text and image conditioning.

Wan2.1 InfiniteTalk.summary: Audio-driven lip-sync video generation from a character portrait image, producing synchronized speaking animation.

Wan.summary: Foundational Wan video model family — supports text/image-to-video, ControlNet, motion control, and video editing.
strengths: Handles both text and image inputs

Nano Banana Pro.summary: Multimodal model specialized in prompt adherence and complex image editing, capable of generating consistent multi-angle views from a single reference image.

Nano Banana 2.summary: Google's Gemini 3.1 Flash Image model optimized for fast generation with support for up to 4K resolution, capable of text-to-image and image editing tasks.

Nano Banana 2 Lite.summary: Ultra-fast variant of the Gemini Flash Image model for text-to-image and image editing. Generates images in ~4 seconds, making it the fastest option for rapid prototyping, quick iterations, and high-throughput workflows. Ideal when speed is the priority without sacrificing basic image quality.
strengths: Best for rapid prototyping and iterative workflows

Nano Banana.summary: Efficient model optimized for precise prompt adherence and image-to-video tasks. Suitable for most creative workflows.

Grok.summary: Fast, high-quality video generation and image editing by xAI. Used via API for text-to-video, image-to-video, and image editing.

LTX-2.3.summary: A high-quality video generation model from Lightricks supporting both text-to-video and image-to-video with native audio and start/end frame control.

LTX-2.summary: Affordable, fast image-to-video model from Lightricks with native synchronized sound generation. Ideal for turning still images into short animated clips with audio.

Kling 3.0.summary: Latest frontier model from Kling with native audio and extended durations up to 15 seconds, supporting text-driven video generation and advanced frame interpolation.

Kling O3.summary: Versatile model for generating and editing images and videos, featuring outpainting, image editing, and character reference capabilities.

Kling O1.summary: Kling Omni image and video model with support for up to 10 reference images with tags, enabling character-consistent generation across text-to-image and video-to-video tasks.

Kling.summary: A family of video generation models offering high-quality text-to-video, image-to-video, and video editing with cinematic motion and optional native audio.

Google Gemini Image.summary: Google's multi-modal image model specialized for character and product-focused generation, including virtual try-on and fashion editorial outputs.

Google Gemini.summary: Google's multi-modal family supporting image, video, audio, and text generation.
strengths: Multi-modal text, image, video, audio generation

Gemini3 Pro Image Preview.summary: Google's latest image model supporting brand design, mockups, style reference, and multiple angles for high-quality image generation and editing.

Gemini Omni.summary: Google's unified multi-modal generation model supporting text-to-video, image-to-video, and video editing within a single API. Enables consistent video generation and editing across multiple modalities from simple prompts.
strengths: Unified multi-modal video generation and editing
Single API for text-to-video, image-to-video, and video editing

GPT Image 2.summary: Advanced image generation and editing model from OpenAI with superior prompt adherence, ideal for complex diagrams, characters, and image editing tasks.

GPT-Image-1.summary: Older ChatGPT image model. Intelligent prompt adherence with sharp semi-realistic output.

GPT-Image-1.5.summary: Smartest model with excellent prompt following, ideal for complex diagrams, characters, and image editing tasks like virtual try-on and product mockups.

OpenAI.summary: OpenAI model family supporting text-to-image, image-to-video, text-to-video, and text generation.

Hunyuan3D.summary: Tencent's 3D generation model that creates high-quality 3D meshes with PBR textures from text or single/multi-view images.

Tripo.summary: 3D model generation from text or image, supporting various output formats.
strengths: Fast generation from image or text

Recraft.summary: Sharp, detailed images from Recraft with Standard and Pro modes.

ByteDance.summary: ByteDance's multi-modal model family for high-resolution image and video generation, editing, and brand design. Seedream models handle text-to-image and image editing at up to 2K resolution, while Seedance models specialize in video generation and first-last frame interpolation.
strengths: Video generation with first/last frame control
Optimized for brand design and product mockups

Seedance 2.0.summary: Seedance 2.0 is ByteDance's frontier video generation model that produces cinematic motion with optional synchronized audio. It supports text-to-video, reference-to-video (using images, video, or audio tags), and first-last-frame interpolation for controlled sequences. A faster variant (Seedance 2.0 Fast) offers the same capabilities at reduced inference time.
strengths: Cinematic motion quality with smooth, film-like camera movement
Optional synchronized audio generation alongside video output
Reference-guided generation using tagged images, video clips, or audio cues
First-last-frame control for precise scene interpolation
Real human identity verification for consistent character generation
Fast variant (Seedance 2.0 Fast) with reduced latency for real-time workflows

Seedance.summary: Seedance is a family of video generation models from ByteDance supporting text-to-video and image-to-video with optional audio generation and end frame control.
strengths: Latest model with audio and end frame support
Fast and cheap model, up to 12 seconds

Seedream.summary: ByteDance's latest high-quality model converts product images into multi-angle videos with cinematic effects. Supports flexible resolutions and multiple model variants.

Vidu Q2.summary: High-quality video generation model with reference image support, capable of image-to-video and video extension tasks.

Vidu.summary: Versatile video generation model supporting text and image inputs with synchronized audio output.
strengths: Dual input modes: text and image

HiDream.summary: Text-to-image diffusion model with image editing support.

Qwen-Image.summary: Semi-realistic model with great text generation and prompt adherence. Capable of following long and highly detailed prompts.

Qwen-Image-Edit.summary: Advanced image editing model with 3D, relighting, style transfer, and ControlNet support.

Z-Image-Turbo.summary: Fast text-to-image with batch generation, ControlNet, and video generation support.

ElevenLabs.summary: Audio generation with text-to-speech, voice cloning, lip sync, sound effects, and voice isolation.

ACE-Step.summary: ACE-Step is a family of audio and music generation models capable of producing high-quality music, instrumentals, and audio from text prompts. It includes variants optimized for speed (Turbo) and quality (SFT), and also supports AI-driven lyric song generation with optional external LLM integration.
strengths: Fast music generation with Turbo variant
High-quality audio output with SFT variant
Supports both instrumental and lyrical music creation
Multiple model size options (e.g., 4B LLM-based) for flexibility

Stable Audio.summary: Audio generation from text prompts, supporting audio-to-audio transformations.

Topaz.summary: AI image and video upscaling model with detail enhancement and artifact reduction.

Magnific.summary: Image enhancement and upscaling with portrait, relighting, and style reference features.

BRIA.summary: BRIA is an API-based model specialized in image and video editing tasks, particularly background removal, outpainting, and retouching. It excels at automating precision edits like extracting subjects from videos with transparent backgrounds or expanding image boundaries seamlessly. The FIBO variant supports structured image editing guided by text instructions.
strengths: Accurate background removal for both images and videos with transparency support
Seamless outpainting and expansion of image boundaries
Efficient video processing including green screen conversion and background replacement
Text-driven image editing with structured instructions via FIBO model option
Fast API-driven workflows suitable for batch or real-time applications

Seedream 4.5.summary: High-resolution text-to-image model optimized for vibrant photorealism, commonly used for virtual try-on and outfit combination tasks.

Luma UNI-1.summary: Luma UNI-1 is an intelligent model that reasons through prompts before generating images. It supports optional visual references for style guidance and can edit existing images via text prompts.

Kling o1.summary: Intelligent video generation model that reasons before generating. Supports image, element, and video references for precise creative control.

Luma.summary: Luma is an older medium model from Luma Labs capable of image-to-video and image-to-image generation, known for producing natural motion.

SeedVR2.summary: ByteDance's fast upscaler for images and videos, up to 4K resolution.

Kling o3.summary: Advanced reasoning video model supporting 1080p (Pro) and 720p, with image, element, and video references for precise creative control.

Anima.summary: Anima is a specialized model designed for generating high-quality anime and illustration-style images from text prompts. It excels at producing vibrant, detailed artwork that closely follows the provided descriptions, making it ideal for artists and creators seeking anime-themed visuals.
strengths: Exceptional quality of anime and illustration outputs
Accurate adherence to text prompts for style and composition
Vibrant color palettes and fine linework typical of anime art

BiRefNet.summary: BiRefNet is a high-precision background removal model that excels at image matting, producing clean cutouts with fine detail preservation. It is widely used for tasks like removing backgrounds from portraits, products, and complex scenes, delivering smooth edges and transparent overlays.
strengths: High-precision matting with fine detail retention (e.g., hair, fur)
Clean background removal for diverse subjects (people, objects, animals)
Handles complex boundaries and semi-transparent regions
Suitable for both professional photo editing and automated workflows

Boogu.summary: Comfy-Org image model family: Boogu Turbo is a distilled 10B-parameter text-to-image pipeline (4 steps, photorealistic); Boogu image 0.1 Edit supports instruction-driven image editing.
strengths: Fast photorealistic text-to-image in few steps
Strong prompt adherence and bilingual text rendering
Instruction-based image edit with comparison output

Capybara.summary: Capybara is a versatile vision-language model capable of generating and editing both images and videos. It can create images from text descriptions, animate reference images into videos, and perform instruction-based editing on images and videos. The model supports a range of tasks including text-to-image, image-to-video, and image/video editing.
strengths: Handles both image and video generation/editing
Supports text-guided editing of images and videos
Animates static images into videos with motion prompts
Offers multiple workflow categories (Image, Video) with moderate usage
Accepts combined image and text inputs for precise control

Chatter Box.summary: Chatter Box is a talking head and lip-sync model that also excels at voice cloning and text-to-speech generation. It supports multilingual TTS, multi-speaker conversations, and audio conversion, making it ideal for creating synthetic speech with cloned voices.
strengths: High-quality voice cloning with minimal reference audio
Multi-speaker dialog generation with distinct cloned voices

Chroma.summary: Chroma is an advanced image generation and editing model that excels at text-to-image creation with a specialty in chroma key compositing. It produces high-quality visuals suitable for seamless integration into other projects via green screen techniques.
strengths: Produces vivid, high-quality images from text prompts
Optimized for chroma key (green screen) compositing workflows
Enables efficient creation of assets for video and graphic design
Offers a variant (Chroma1 Radiance) for enhanced radiance and lighting

Claude.summary: Anthropic's LLM for prompt enhancement and text reasoning in workflows.

DWPose.summary: A pose estimation model for extracting skeleton keypoints from images and video frames, commonly used for animation and gesture recognition.

ERNIE-Image.summary: Baidu's text-to-image generation model for creating images from textual prompts.

FILM.summary: Frame interpolation model for smooth slow-motion and frame rate conversion.

FireRed Image Edit 1.1.summary: Image editing model supporting inpainting and local edits with high fidelity.

FlashVSR.summary: Fast video super-resolution and restoration model for upscaling with enhanced detail and motion consistency.

Gemma 4.summary: Google's lightweight open LLM for text generation and prompt enhancement.

HappyHorse 1.0.summary: HappyHorse 1.0 generates videos from text instructions and image references, supporting video editing and image-to-video generation.

HappyHorse 1.1.summary: HappyHorse 1.1 generates short videos with synchronized dialogue, sound effects, and music from text, a first frame, or reference images.
strengths: Native audio-video generation in one pass
Character and scene consistency from reference images
Suited to ads, episodic shorts, and game cutscenes

HitPaw.summary: HitPaw is a third-party API for enhancing and upscaling videos and images. It offers multiple restoration and generative models tailored for portraits and general content.

HuMo.summary: Human motion generation and transfer model from text prompts, producing animated pose images.

Hunyuan Video.summary: Tencent's text-to-video and image-to-video generation model.

IP Adapter.summary: Image prompt adapter for style and content reference in image generation.

Ideogram.summary: Open image model focused on design, text rendering, and 2K photorealistic output.

Kandinsky.summary: Multi-modal generative model for text-to-image and image-to-video tasks, supporting English and Russian prompts.

Krea 2.summary: Krea 2 is a generative image model family optimized for artistic photorealism and expressive illustrations. It supports LoRA fine-tuning and offers variants balancing speed and quality.

LTX-0.9.5.summary: Fast text-to-video and image-to-video generation by Lightricks.

Lens.summary: Simulates camera lens effects such as depth of field, bokeh, and optical aberrations for realistic image rendering.

LivePortrait.summary: Realistic portrait animation with precise expression control using a reference video.

LongCat.summary: LongCat is a text-to-image model that generates images from textual prompts.

LongCat Image Edit.summary: A model designed for editing images using text prompts, supporting common editing tasks like inpainting and outpainting.

Mediapipe.summary: Google's face and pose landmark detection model for real-time tracking.

MiniMax.summary: Frontier AI model for video generation with strong motion dynamics. Capable of text-to-video and image-to-video tasks.

MoGe.summary: Monocular geometry estimation for depth and normal maps, enabling 3D reconstruction from a single image.

NewBie.summary: NewBie is an image generation model specialized for creating anime-style images from text prompts, excelling at character art and scenes.

OmniGen.summary: Unified multi-modal generation model capable of text-to-image and image editing tasks within a single framework.
strengths: Unified for image generation and editing

OpenRouter.summary: OpenRouter provides a unified API gateway to route requests across multiple large language models, enabling cost-efficient fallback and model selection.

Ovis-Image.summary: Ovis-Image is a text-to-image generation model that produces images from textual prompts.

PiD.summary: Personal image dataset model for custom image generation, enabling tailored outputs from user-provided images.

PixVerse.summary: A model for generating stylized videos from text prompts or reference images, with support for template-based animation.

PixelDiT.summary: Diffusion transformer model for high-quality image generation.

Qwen 3.0.summary: Alibaba's advanced LLM for text reasoning and prompt enhancement.

Qwen Image Edit 2511.summary: Qwen image editing model from November 2025 with enhanced inpainting.

Qwen-Image 2512.summary: Latest Qwen model with enhanced human realism, finer natural detail for landscapes and textures, and improved text rendering with better layout and composition.

Qwen-Image-Layered.summary: Generates images by decomposing a text prompt into multiple compositional layers, enabling fine-grained control over each element.

Qwen3.5.summary: Latest Qwen open LLM with enhanced reasoning.

Reve.summary: Reve is an image editing model that can remix multiple reference images and follow text instructions to produce edited outputs.

Rodin.summary: Text-to-3D and image-to-3D generation for digital assets.

Runway.summary: Runway provides a suite of AI models for cinematic video generation, editing, and image-to-video tasks, including the Gen-4 and Gen-3 series.

SAM3.summary: Meta's Segment Anything Model 3 for zero-shot segmentation of images and videos. It produces high-quality masks without task-specific training.

SD1.5.summary: Foundational open-source text-to-image model, also widely used as a base for video generation workflows like AnimateDiff.

SD3.5.summary: Stability AI's next-gen open text-to-image model with enhanced quality.

SDPose-OOD.summary: Pose estimation model specialized for out-of-distribution poses, supporting multi-person detection and generating pose maps.

SDXL.summary: Stability AI's high-resolution text-to-image model with strong aesthetics.

SUPIR.summary: Scalable upscaling model for real-world image restoration.

SVD.summary: Stable Video Diffusion generates short videos from a single input image using a latent diffusion model.

Seed 2.0.summary: ByteDance's Seed 2.0 is a text-to-image generation model focused on high quality and fast inference.

Seedream 5.0 Lite.summary: ByteDance's latest high-quality text-to-image model that integrates deep thinking and web search for more informed image generation, supporting up to 14 style presets.

Sonilo.summary: Sonilo generates music and soundtracks from text prompts or video inputs.

Stability.summary: Stability AI's text-to-audio model generates high-quality audio from textual descriptions, enabling creative sound design and music production.

SwitchX.summary: SwitchX is a text-guided editing model for images and videos, allowing regional changes with optional reference image for style and lighting.

Tripo P1.summary: Tripo's advanced 3D generation model that converts text, images, or multiview references into game-ready 3D assets with clean topology.

TripoSplat.summary: TripoSplat reconstructs a 3D scene as Gaussian splats from multi-view images, enabling fast and high-quality 3D reconstruction.

VOID.summary: Video object inpainting and removal model.

Veo.summary: Frontier video generation model by Google. Produces high-quality videos from text prompts and reference images, with optional audio.

Wan ATI.summary: Wan ATI is a motion control model for animating still images along user-defined paths, enabling precise and customizable video generation.

Wan2.1 SCAIL.summary: Wan2.1 with SCAIL character replacement for video editing, allowing consistent identity swapping while preserving original motion and pose.

Wan2.7.summary: Wan2.7 is an advanced video generation model from Alibaba supporting image-to-video and video editing tasks with improved quality and multi-shot input.

WaveSpeed.summary: Fast image upscaling model for high-resolution outputs (2K, 4K, 8K) using specialized nodes.

Z-Image.summary: Budget-friendly text-to-image model offering fast generation and medium-quality photorealistic textures, but limited diversity.

wan2.2 Animate.summary: Wan2.2 Animate enables automatic character replacement and animation in videos, using a reference image to insert a character into an input video.

Quiver.summary: Text-to-SVG and image-to-SVG vector generation model for scalable graphics.
strengths: Supports both text and image inputs

Depth Anything v2.summary: Monocular depth estimation model capable of generating high-quality relative depth maps from single images and videos.

Bernini-R.summary: Bernini-R is a text-driven image and video editing model that modifies visual content based on natural language prompts. It excels at localized edits and style changes in both still images and video frames, though outputs are limited to single images even for video tasks.
strengths: Accurate text-guided edits with semantic coherence
Handles both image and video editing workflows
Produces high-quality edited frames from videos
Efficient for rapid iteration on visual content

ChronoEdit.summary: ChronoEdit is a model designed for temporal video editing tasks, enabling users to modify video content with coherent changes across frames. It specializes in maintaining consistency when altering objects, backgrounds, or style over time, and can be used for video inpainting, style transfer, and frame interpolation.

Flux.1 Krea Dev.summary: Flux.1 Krea Dev is a developer-focused variant of the Flux.1 text-to-image model, optimized for high-quality image generation and rapid prototyping in creative AI workflows.

Gemini-2.5-Flash.summary: Used for text-to-image generation and image editing via the Google Gemini API, enabling dynamic visual content creation.

Gemini-3.1-Pro.summary: Video generation model that produces videos from reference images and optional text prompts, commonly used for commercial product placements and creative video production.

Gemini-3.1-flash-lite.summary: Lightweight Gemini variant optimized for generating short video sequences from keyframe images, primarily used in frame-to-video workflows with tools like Kling 3.0.

Google.summary: Provider placeholder in index metadata; pending model-specific profile.

Kling 1.6.summary: Kling 1.6 is a video generation model that produces high-quality, realistic videos from text or image inputs, supporting complex multi-character interactions.

Kling 2.0.summary: Kling 2.0 is a text-to-video generation model known for high-quality motion and physical consistency, suitable for creating dynamic video clips from prompts.

Kling 2.6.summary: Animates static images into video with optional audio synchronization and transfers motion from reference videos to characters. Designed for API-based media generation.

Lightricks.summary: Provider placeholder in index metadata; pending model-specific profile.

None.summary: Placeholder for utility templates without a primary model in index metadata.

Nvidia.summary: Provider placeholder in index metadata; pending model-specific profile.

Qwen.summary: Qwen is a text-to-image model that generates images from prompts and performs relighting by transferring lighting characteristics from a reference image, with support for LoRA fine-tuning.

RIFE.summary: RIFE is a real-time frame interpolation model that generates intermediate frames between existing ones, commonly used for smooth slow-motion video and motion smoothing.

Reimagine.summary: Topaz Reimagine enhances and upscales images, restoring detail and improving facial quality via API.

SCAIL-2.summary: A video generation model specialized for character replacement, enabling users to edit existing videos by swapping or inserting characters using text prompts.

Seedance 1.5 Pro.summary: Seedance 1.5 Pro is a video generation model for creating high-quality, coherent motion from text prompts or reference images.

Seedance1.0 Pro.summary: A video generation model by ByteDance that animates images into videos and creates cinematic transitions between start and end frames.

Seedream 4.0.summary: Seedream 4.0 is a text-to-image generative model optimized for creating high-fidelity, artistic, and dreamlike visuals from natural language prompts.

Tencent.summary: Tencent Hunyuan is a large-scale text-to-image diffusion model with strong Chinese language understanding and high-fidelity generation.

Vidu Q1.summary: Vidu Q1 generates high-resolution 1080p videos from text prompts or reference images. It is designed for dynamic video creation and animation.

Vidu Q3.summary: Vidu Q3 is a text-to-video generation model focused on producing short clips from textual prompts.

Wan2.5.summary: Wan2.5 is a versatile generative model capable of both text-to-image and image-to-video tasks, with optional audio synchronization for video outputs.

Wan2.6.summary: Wan2.6 is a video generation model that creates dynamic videos from either text prompts or reference images, making it versatile for various video creation needs.

none.summary: Placeholder for utility templates without a primary model in index metadata.

Depth Anything v3.summary: Depth Anything 3 (DA3) vision transformer for spatially consistent depth estimation from single images, video frames, and multi-view inputs.
strengths: Works on single images and video

HeyGen.summary: HeyGen is an API for creating talking photos and avatar videos with realistic lip-sync, used for generating animated characters from images or text prompts.

JoyAI Image Edit.summary: JoyAI Image Edit is a text-guided image editing model that generates and modifies images from text prompts.

Seed Audio 1.0.summary: Seed Audio 1.0 is a generative audio model capable of producing audio from text descriptions, as well as transforming existing audio with text prompts.

Seedream 5.0 Pro.summary: Seedream 5.0 Pro is a high-performance text-to-image and image editing model available via API, offering multiple variant versions for flexible generation and editing tasks.

Sync 3.summary: Sync 3 generates lip-synced videos from text or images with audio, enabling talking avatars and speech-synchronized animations.
